sqlMap.select:
SELECT B.PRESENCE as presence, A.CN as cn, A.UPNNAME as upnname, A.TEAMSID as teamsid FROM TBL_USERMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE B ON A.TEAMSID = B.ID WHERE A.CN IN
#[]#
SELECT AUTHTOKEN FROM TBL_AUTHTOKEN WHERE APITYPE = #APITYPE# AND TOKENTYPE = #TOKENTYPE# ORDER BY UPDATEDATE DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT TEAMSID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TEAMSID IS NOT NULL AND TEAMSID != ''
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERPRESENCE SET PRESENCE = #presence#, UPDATETIME = #updateTime# WHERE ID = #id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERPRESENCE (ID, PRESENCE, UPDATETIME) VALUES (#id#, #presence#, #updateTime#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_AUTHTOKEN WHERE APITYPE = #APITYPE# AND TOKENTYPE = #TOKENTYPE#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_AUTHTOKEN (APITYPE, TOKENTYPE, AUTHTOKEN, UPDATEDATE) VALUES (#APITYPE#, #TOKENTYPE#, #TOKEN#, NOW())
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_AUTHTOKEN SET AUTHTOKEN = #TOKEN#, UPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE APITYPE = #APITYPE# AND TOKENTYPE = #TOKENTYPE#
